final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for Changan Qiyuan Q06 new vehicle launch announcement.

Style/medium: PPT cover slide, corporate automotive presentation
Composition: title and subtitle placement with generous negative space for text overlay
Subject: Changan Qiyuan Q06 vehicle launch, September release announcement
Scene/backdrop: transparent, breathtaking background image suitable for automotive brand presentation
Lighting/mood: premium, aspirational, forward-looking
Color palette: aligned with Changan brand identity
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: must accommodate title and subtitle text overlay, readable at presentation distance
Avoid: cluttered composition, conflicting colors with brand palette, generic stock-photo aesthetic
